test.name: Newspapers.com obituary search with date range
test.description: Newspapers.com has a different query structure from the record sites (query={first}+{last} with dr_year / dr_place range parameters). The curated-links fixture returns only Ancestry URLs, so the Newspapers.com URL comes from the site-wide template. An obituary search needs the death window (1880-1905), not a single year.

input.user_message: Search Newspapers.com for Patrick Flynn's obituary in Schuylkill County, between 1880 and 1905.

judge_context: Generated URL should target newspapers.com/search with the name as the query term and the 1880-1905 window and Pennsylvania/Schuylkill place expressed via its range parameters (dr_year / dr_place or equivalent) — not the record-site parameter style (no birthplace/birth= parameters)
Should provide capture-workflow instructions (click, save the results page or clipping as PDF, upload back) and note Newspapers.com is a paid site so a login may be required
A research-log entry must be written in the same turn the URL is generated: site newspapers, outcome partial, capture_received false, query capturing name + date range + place
